question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookService.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getHooks(HooksRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user supply an arbitrary ownerId in HooksRequest without any caller-identity check, causing getHooks() to return all hooks belonging to a victim account, because HookServiceImpl never verifies the requester IS the owner before querying hookRepository?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookService.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getHookStorage(HookStorageRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user supply any ownerId and hookId in HookStorageRequest to retrieve all storage entries of a hook they do not own, because getHookStorage() performs no ownership or signer verification before calling hookStorageRepository?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookService.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getHookStorageChange(HookStorageRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user set a non-empty timestamp Bound in HookStorageRequest to trigger the historical code path in getHookStorageChange(), bypassing the deleted-is-false filter and reading storage entries that were deleted/cleared by the owner, without any signer approval?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookService.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getHooks(HooksRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user set lowerBound=0 and upperBound=Long.MAX_VALUE (the defaults in HooksRequest) to enumerate every hook ID belonging to any victim ownerId, because no authorization check prevents full-range enumeration without owner approval?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookService.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getHooks(HooksRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user enumerate hooks of any account by iterating over all possible ownerId values in HooksRequest, since entityService.lookup() resolves the entity without checking whether the caller has permission to list that entity's hooks?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookService.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getHookStorageChange(HookStorageRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user reconstruct the full write history of a victim hook's storage by querying getHookStorageChange() with a wide timestamp range, because the native query in HookStorageChangeRepository returns all historical value_written entries without requiring the caller to be an authorized signer?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookService.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getHooks(HooksRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user bypass owner approval by supplying a hookIds list containing IDs they do not own in HooksRequest, causing findByOwnerIdAndHookIdIn() to return those hooks without any check that the caller is an authorized signer of the owner account?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookService.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getHookStorage(HookStorageRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user access storage of a hook belonging to a high-value account (e.g., a treasury or multisig) by simply passing that account's ownerId in HookStorageRequest, since no multi-signer approval or ownership proof is required by getHookStorage()?
